root.m_Talk_FRA: But you know what I'm like.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm the type who finds satisfaction in doing the complete opposite of what others tell me not to do.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm the type who finds satisfaction in doing the complete opposite of what others tell me not to do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Instead, I'll win no matter what.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Instead, I'll win no matter what.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll win and save everyone.
